tagline: AI-Powered WhatsApp Safety Companion for Solo Travelers

challenge.headline: Solo travelers overwhelmed by fragmented info
challenge.description: Solo travelers relied on scattered sources to find destination-specific guidance, making quick access to help stressful and time-consuming. There was no single, familiar channel that could deliver calm, personalized support exactly when it was needed most.

result.headline: Confident solo travel, delivered via WhatsApp
result.quote: Alertora made me feel like I had a friend watching out for me the entire trip. The check-ins after every activity gave me so much peace of mind.
